title: rubus glaucus
intro: Rubus glaucus, also known as the red-stemmed bramble or European dewberry, is a shrub-like plant in the rose family native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus glaucus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through tea infusions, tinctures, or dried powder, often used to treat various ailments, including gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions.
